nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Staffordshire): topographic name from northern Middle English ask ‘ash tree’ (Old Norse askr), or a habitational name from Aske (North Yorkshire). Compare Ash .

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Axe
meanings: English (West Yorkshire, Lincolnshire): variant of Aske with metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled with an x.

English (Dorset, Somerset): habitational name from Axe Farm in Chardstock (Devon, formerly in Dorset), itself named for the river Axe, which forms part of the south-eastern boundary of Chardstock parish.
Americanized form of German   Axt   or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Aske was born about 1170, in Easby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Conan de Aske, was 32 and his mother, Sibilla de Aslakby, was 22. He married Alicia Cauton. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Aske, Easby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Aske est né environ 1170, à Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Conan de Aske, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sibilla de Aslakby, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alicia Cauton. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Aske, Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Aske(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 요르크실르 이스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conan de Aske(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla de Aslakby(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Alicia Cauton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스비 아스크에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Aske родился около 1170 г. в местности эасби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Conan de Aske было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sibilla de Aslakby, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Cauton. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности аск, эасби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
